_comment: Dedicated write-safety fixture limits DB for the generic Claude Code safety e2e (test_safety_writes.py, test_safety_approval_e2e.py). Intentionally decoupled from any preset's production channel_limits.json so those e2e never depend on real lattice data. Two channels model the two safety properties the tests need: a bounded writable setpoint and a read-only readback. Names follow the standard RING:SYSTEM:FAMILY:DEVICE:FIELD:SUBFIELD grammar; they need not exist in the manifest because the safety project points its limits database_path here.

defaults._comment: Default settings inherited by all channels unless overridden.

SR:DIAG:TEMP:01:TEMPERATURE:SP._comment: Bounded, low-criticality writable setpoint. Writes within [0, 100] succeed; writes outside are denied by the limits layer. verification:none = fastest write mode.

SR:MAG:QF:01:CURRENT:RB._comment: Read-only readback: any write must be blocked with READ_ONLY_CHANNEL.
